mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, dish_id, dish_name, price, quantity) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{dishId}, #{dishName}, #{price}, #{quantity})

INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, dish_id, dish_name, price, quantity) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.dishName}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, dish_id, dish_name, price, quantity FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
